task_completion.description: Open the baby feeding tracker spreadsheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Calc is open and displaying the 'baby_feeding_tracker.ods' file, showing a list of Feed and Sleep events.

task_completion.description: Calculate the duration of events using time-based formulas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new column or set of cells is populated with time durations (e.g., End Time minus Start Time) for the feeding and sleep events.

task_completion.description: Calculate summary statistics for sleep patterns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A summary section or cell displays the longest sleep stretch or total sleep time, likely using a formula like MAXIFS.

task_completion.description: Calculate summary statistics for feeding patterns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A summary section or cell displays feeding statistics, such as the average feeding interval or feeding frequency.

task_completion.description: Apply conditional formatting to highlight specific patterns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Specific cells in the data (e.g., short feeding intervals or long sleep stretches) are automatically highlighted with distinct background or text colors based on formatting rules.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the LibreOffice Calc GUI rather than using terminal scripts to modify the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the LibreOffice Calc interface being actively used (e.g., navigating menus, selecting cells, typing in the formula bar).

integrity.description: The agent used actual spreadsheet formulas rather than hardcoding the final calculated values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The formula bar in LibreOffice Calc shows actual formulas (e.g., '=D2-C2', '=MAXIFS(...)', '=AVERAGE(...)') when a calculated cell is selected.

integrity.description: The agent used the conditional formatting tool rather than manually coloring individual cells.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Conditional Formatting' dialog box is visible in at least one screenshot, or the highlighting perfectly matches a logical rule across multiple cells rather than arbitrary manual highlighting.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target file is '/home/ga/Documents/baby_feeding_tracker.ods' containing 12 synthetic entries (6 Feed, 6 Sleep) from 2024-01-15. The task requires calculating event durations (End Time - Start Time), summary statistics (specifically longest sleep stretch using MAXIFS, and average feeding interval), and applying conditional formatting. Note: The task instructions suggest highlighting feeding intervals < 1.5 hours as potential issues, so look for conditional formatting targeting these short intervals or exceptionally long sleep stretches.
